title: Doff Greenfly & Blackfly Control – 1L Pest Spray for Garden and Greenhouse – Aphid, Whitefly & Spider Mite Repellent – Protects Edible & Ornamental Plants with Added Plant Feed – Bee-Friendly Formula
features: RELIABLE GREENFLY & BLACKFLY CONTROL – Protect your garden and greenhouse with Doff Greenfly & Blackfly Control. This ready-to-use bug spray tackles pests like aphids, whitefly, and spider mites. It works by physical action, blocking pest feeding tubes to ensure their removal

EFFECTIVE & VERSATILE – Spray both sides of leaves until wet, applying directly to pests for maximum impact. Use late afternoon or early morning, avoiding direct sunlight to prevent leaf scorch. This greenfly and blackfly spray can be reapplied every 7 days for continuous protection

PROTECT & NOURISH – This insecticide-free formula is bee-friendly and safe to use on edible crops and ornamental plants like vegetables, fruits, herbs, and houseplants. With added plant feed to promote healthier growth and vibrant leaves, it prevents powdery mildew for a thriving pest-free garden

CLEAN & COMPREHENSIVE – Free from harmful chemicals, this effective formula can be applied up to a day before harvesting edible crops. Perfect for control of aphid attacks, it ensures pests do not develop resistance to its use and die in situ or fall off leaves and stems of plants

KEEP ON GROWING – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering safe and effective pest control to help your garden grow
